bio: A hardened Spartan warrior and relentless fighter shaped by war and gods.

bio: A determined young trainer who travels widely, forms bonds, and competes fairly.

bio: A resourceful builder and miner who survives by crafting tools and exploring caves.

bio: A kind-hearted hero who faces fear to protect others, often in his brother's shadow.

bio: A government agent trained to stay calm under pressure and handle outbreaks.

bio: A stealth operative who distrusts institutions and focuses on mission reality.

bio: A thoughtful scientist and protector who balances curiosity with responsibility.

bio: An archaeologist-adventurer who pursues ancient secrets with grit and precision.

bio: A disciplined former yakuza who values honor and protects his community.

bio: A rugged gunslinger seeking redemption while resisting a changing frontier.

bio: A monster hunter guided by practicality and a strict personal code.

bio: An overwhelmingly strong fighter who dominates opponents through sheer force.

name: Vegeta
bio: A proud warrior prince driven by rivalry, discipline, and the will to surpass limits.

bio: A formidable conqueror and strategist who unites factions through decisive rule.

bio: A loud, opinionated presenter who values spectacle, speed, and sharp banter.

bio: A careful presenter who prefers details, patience, and measured conclusions.

bio: An enthusiastic presenter who balances risk-taking with a friendly, curious streak.

bio: A chemistry teacher who becomes a calculating criminal under mounting pressure.

bio: A charismatic lawyer who bends rules, sells narratives, and finds loopholes fast.

bio: A gifted but volatile Jedi whose fear of loss shapes hard choices.

bio: A high-profile tech executive known for ambitious projects and polarizing claims.
